hooks.command: input=$(cat); [ -d .metrognome ] && printf '%s' "$input" | grep -qiE 'performance|\bjank|\bfps\b|frame.?rate|re-?render|memory leak|\bRAM\b|bundle size|cold start|\bTTI\b|\bslow\b|optimi[sz]e|profil(e|ing)|FlatList|SectionList|FlashList|dropped frame|hermes' && printf '[metrognome] This repo is metrognome-tracked. Before any RN perf work, consult .metrognome/perf-memory.md (known hotspots, proven fixes, reverted dead-ends) and record any newly-found gap or measured result there. Run /metrognome for the autonomous loop or the Perf Map 3D.' || true
